title: Savory Marinate Stir Fry
description: This savory and light Vietnamese dish features a diabetic-friendly marinate to add flavor to your choice of vegetables, perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots, broccoli), diced

instructions: In a bowl, mix fish sauce, brown sugar, minced garlic, and salt and pepper to make the marinade. Let it sit for at least 15 minutes.
Add mixed vegetables into the marinade and let them marinate for an additional 10 minutes.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the marinated vegetables and cook until they are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Squeeze fresh herbs on top of the stir-fried vegetables before serving to add extra flavor.
